message:
style(tools/lib): collapse parse_recipients_json_value match arms with | separator

Trailing clippy nit on the match expression added in the earlier
"shared malformed-JSON sentinels" commit.  The original four-arm
shape:
    Ok(_) if input.trim().is_empty() => json!({}),
    Ok(_) => malformed_recipients_payload(),
    Err(_) if input.trim().is_empty() => json!({}),
    Err(_) => malformed_recipients_payload(),

has the same body on both empty-input arms and the same body on
both non-empty arms.  Collapse via `|`:
    Ok(_) | Err(_) if input.trim().is_empty() => json!({}),
    Ok(_) | Err(_) => malformed_recipients_payload(),

Same control flow (the guard checks input.trim().is_empty()
before either body runs), and clippy::match_same_arms no longer
fires.  Two fewer lines, no behavioral change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
